name: Mini-Cheesecakes (Vanilla Wafers)
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cream Cheese, divided into 2 portions of 4 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a muffin tin with foil liners.
2. Place one vanilla wafer in each liner.
3. Mix the cream cheese and vanilla with sugar on medium speed until well-blended.
4. Add eggs to the mixture, mixing well.
5. Pour the filling over the wafers, filling each 3/4 full.
6. Bake for 25 minutes at 325°F.
7. Remove from the pan when cool.
8. Chill thoroughly before serving.
9. Top with fruit, preserves, nuts, or chocolate as desired. Be creative.
